state.next-action: `12-02` now uses `/portal/ops/*` as the canonical staff route family while legacy `/ops/*` paths remain compatibility redirects. `/portal/ops/users` now covers role-template assignment, Clerk invite send or reissue, pending-invite revoke, provider resync, and app-owned suspend or restore actions while preserving first-party staff roles and non-active status during Clerk reconciliation. Continue the phase by moving to `/portal/ops/customers`: add account-link cleanup, customer portal-access cleanup, and app-owned Stripe customer repair or clear actions behind the same per-record ops API pattern. If feature flags expand beyond env toggles, keep them behind an app-owned adapter so Vercel Flags can be swapped later without scattering provider calls through the UI.
